product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Evolve Box Stop End
product.description: The Alutec Evolve aluminium box gutter stop end (internal and external) is popular for medium/large residential or small/medium commercial property owners looking for a standard capacity rainwater system. product.name: 115mm Deepstyle Gutter x 4m length
product.description: Deepstyle's high capacity nature provides a very efficient system for the drainage of large roof areas, whilst still providing a discrete unobtrusive rainwater system. Deepstyle offers an increase of 50% in-flow capacity when compared to the 112mm Roundstyle System. The high capacity nature of Deepstyle has the potential to reduce the number of downpipe and drainage runs required. This decreases the installation time and can reduce the overall cost dramatically.

product.name: 114mm Square Stopend Outlet
product.description: The 114mm Squarestyle Stopend Outlet is manufactured in uPVC by Brett Martin. The Stopend Outlet works in the same way as a Running outlet, but specifically designed to use at the end of a gutter run, without the need for internal stopends. The outlet is not handed, so can be used on either a left hand or right hand gutter end. The Stopend Outlet is for use with the Brett Martin 65mm Square Downpipe, but with the use of a Square to Round Adaptor, the 68mm Round Downpipe can also be used. product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Snow Guard
product.description: With the UK weather conditions becoming increasingly unpredictable, installing Floplast's Snow / Tile Guard ensures your property is protected, as well as preventing unnecessary injury from falling tiles, snow and debris.    Easy to handle and straightforward to install.   Prevents snow/tile slippage.   2m wide x 162mm high.   Brackets should be fitted at a maximum of 800mm centres, using two No.2 12 x 1" round head screws.  Galvanised - for long lasting performance.   Protects conservatories from falling roof tiles.   Assists in reducing insurance costs/claims caused by snow/tile damage.

product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. product.name: 100mm Steel Half Round Gutter x 3m
product.description: The 100mm Steel Half Round Gutter is manufacture by Lindab in a 3m length. Can be joined using the Lindab Gutter Joint with Rubber Seal or using the roll joint method. The gutter is finished with a high-build polyester paint, allowing us to supply 8 different colours  Black, Antique White, Brown, Dark Grey, Silver Metallic, Anthracite Metallic, Dark Red and Tile Red.  As you will be aware, the ongoing situation in the Middle East is having a significant impact on global fuel costs. Lindab has informed us that they are no longer able to absorb these increases and have therefore introduced additional surcharges. Unfortunately, we are also unable to absorb these rising costs, although we anticipate that this will be a temporary issue. A25 surchargewill be applied to all orders over 500. The gutter is finished with a high-build polyester paint, allowing us to supply 8 different colours  Black, Antique White, Brown, Dark Grey, Silver Metallic, Anthracite Metallic, Dark Red and Tile Red.  As you will be aware, the ongoing situation in the Middle East is having a significant impact on global fuel costs. Lindab has informed us that they are no longer able to absorb these increases and have therefore introduced additional surcharges. Unfortunately, we are also unable to absorb these rising costs, although we anticipate that this will be a temporary issue. A25 surchargewill be applied to all orders over 500.  Please note: All orders between 0-1000 + vat containing 3mtr lengths of gutter or downpipe, will incur a 75.00 +VAT (90.00 inc vat) delivery charge.  All orders between 0-1000 + vat that contain fittings only will incur 55.00 +VAT. (66.00 inc vat)  For delivery to Northern Ireland, Scottish Highlands and other Offshore UK Addresses, please contact our sales team on 01354 700853 or by email at Sales@DrainageOnline.co.uk.  Drainage Online will be in contact after the order is processed to take the additional delivery charge.

product.description: The 100mm Steel External 135 degree Gutter Angle is manufactured by Lindab in Polyester coated Steel. The Angle unites two gutter lengths at a 135 degree angle. product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: Temporary Downpipe 150m Roll
product.description: The FloPlast Temporary Downpipe roll is available in a 150m roll or 6m lengths. Measures 150mm wide when laid flat, and a diameter of 90mm. The purpose of this product is to be used in an emergency drainage situation to redirect water from one location to another. It is compatible with all outlets and hoppers, due to being made of clear flexible plastic, it's lightweight design makes it extremely user friendly installation. To install the temporary downpipe roll, simply use a zip-tie or a jubilee clip.

product.name: 110mm Bottom Offset Soil Bend 112.5dg
product.description: Drainage Online stock an extensive range of Brett Martin Soil products kitemarked to British Standards, including the 110mm Soil Pipe Bottom Offset Bend - available as a 112.5 degree component. The product is made from highly durable uPVC, and is manufactured to BS EN 1329-1to be used with the top offset bend to create a 'swan neck' section in a soil pipe system. product.name: 32mm Solvent Weld Access Plug
product.description: The Brett Martin 32mm PVC-C Solvent Weld Waste Pipe Access Plug is manufactured to BS EN 1566 using chlorinated polyvinyl chloride, designed to withstand water at temperatures of up to 93 degrees celsius - typically higher than PVC waste systems. The plug is ideal for finishing an installation where a terminus does not require ventilation, but rather an access point to relieve pressurised air caused by the activation of waste appliances.  Download the Brett Martin Waste Datasheet below or get in touch today on 01254 286083 for specifications on Brett Martin waste products.

product.name: 32mm Solvent Weld Knuckle Bend 90dg
product.description: The Brett Martin 32mm PVC-C Waste Pipe Knuckle Bend is available as a 90 degree component. The bend is kitemarked to BS EN 1566, and installation is achieved by simply applying solvent cement around the inner side of the fitting, ready for fixing onto the corresponding pipe or solvent-weld fitting. Knuckle bends are ideal for redirecting waste systems where installation space is limited, with a matched performance to swept bends.  For more technical information or installation advice, get in touch on 01254 286083 or download the Brett Martin Waste Datasheet below.
